Item 1A. Risk Factors

Our business is subject to numerous risks and uncertainties, including those described in this section. If any of these risks actually occur, our business, financial condition, and results of operations could be materially and adversely affected, and the trading price of our common stock could decline.

We depend on a limited number of suppliers for key components, and any disruption in our supply chain could delay production, increase our costs, and harm our relationships with customers. We may not be able to secure alternative sources of supply on acceptable terms, or at all, in a timely manner.

Item 1B. Unresolved Staff Comments

None.
